'''βàöl-t-sh-sh''' ('''kalatsheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flehm|flehm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flehm|flehm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöl-t-sh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kalatsheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilatsheshoko|thilatsheshoko]] || [[word:jilatsheshoko|jilatsheshoko]] || [[word:shilatsheshoko|shilatsheshoko]] || [[word:kilatsheshoko|kilatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulatsheshoko|thuthulatsheshoko]] || [[word:jujulatsheshoko|jujulatsheshoko]] || [[word:shushulatsheshoko|shushulatsheshoko]] || [[word:kukulatsheshoko|kukulatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulatsheshoko|thulatsheshoko]] || [[word:julatsheshoko|julatsheshoko]] || [[word:shulatsheshoko|shulatsheshoko]] || [[word:kulatsheshoko|kulatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulatsheshoko|thulatsheshoko]] || [[word:julatsheshoko|julatsheshoko]] || [[word:shulatsheshoko|shulatsheshoko]] || [[word:kulatsheshoko|kulatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelatsheshoko|thelatsheshoko]] || [[word:jelatsheshoko|jelatsheshoko]] || [[word:shelatsheshoko|shelatsheshoko]] || [[word:kelatsheshoko|kelatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholatsheshoko|thotholatsheshoko]] || [[word:jojolatsheshoko|jojolatsheshoko]] || [[word:shosholatsheshoko|shosholatsheshoko]] || [[word:kokolatsheshoko|kokolatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholatsheshoko|tholatsheshoko]] || [[word:jolatsheshoko|jolatsheshoko]] || [[word:sholatsheshoko|sholatsheshoko]] || [[word:kolatsheshoko|kolatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholatsheshoko|tholatsheshoko]] || [[word:jolatsheshoko|jolatsheshoko]] || [[word:sholatsheshoko|sholatsheshoko]] || [[word:kolatsheshoko|kolatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠlatsheshoko|thΟΠlatsheshoko]] || [[word:jΟΠlatsheshoko|jΟΠlatsheshoko]] || [[word:shΟΠlatsheshoko|shΟΠlatsheshoko]] || [[word:kΟΠlatsheshoko|kΟΠlatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalatsheshoko|thathalatsheshoko]] || [[word:jajalatsheshoko|jajalatsheshoko]] || [[word:shashalatsheshoko|shashalatsheshoko]] || [[word:kakalatsheshoko|kakalatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalatsheshoko|thalatsheshoko]] || [[word:jalatsheshoko|jalatsheshoko]] || [[word:shalatsheshoko|shalatsheshoko]] || [[word:kalatsheshoko|kalatsheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalatsheshoko|thalatsheshoko]] || [[word:jalatsheshoko|jalatsheshoko]] || [[word:shalatsheshoko|shalatsheshoko]] || [[word:kalatsheshoko|kalatsheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalatsheshithi|shalatsheshithi]] || [[word:shalatsheshiji|shalatsheshiji]] || [[word:shalatsheshishi|shalatsheshishi]] || [[word:shalatsheshiki|shalatsheshiki]]
|-

|-

|-
